query: In Power Query my Sales.csv has region names crammed into one column like 'West-CA-Store12' - how do I split that into Region, State, StoreID columns?
why: Split column transform in Power Query Editor - core target intent.

query: I've got 12 monthly excel files in a SharePoint folder all with the same columns, want them combined into one table before loading. whats the cleanest way?
why: Combine Files from a folder is a named Power Query transform in scope.

why: Query folding diagnosis for slow refresh caused by a transform - explicitly in scope.

why: Shaping a wide source into star-schema fact/dimension tables in Power Query - core scope.

query: trying to join my Orders query to the Customers query on CustomerKey to bring in the customer name, do I merge or append?
